interview_preparation.message: Prepare interview notes and confirm logistics.

assessment_deadline.message: Work on assessment and check the deadline.

stale_application.message: Application has been open for 14+ days. Consider follow-up or mark as no response.

weekly_follow_up.message: No update after 7+ days. Consider a polite follow-up.

saved_role.message: Saved role is not applied yet. Decide whether to apply.
